name: Project kickoff notes.xlsx
description: Project kickoff notes for Windbridge Partners

name: Baseline Monitoring Timeline Printout v1 (SUPERSEDED).pdf
description: Older baseline printout dated 2026-02-18 carrying the Feb consult's provisional baseline monitoring date. SUPERSEDED; the current baseline is whatever the most recent weekly Boston IVF nurse coordinator email confirms.

name: IVF Cost Projection Worksheet v3.xlsx
description: Per-cycle procedure ($15K-$20K), per-cycle medication ($3K-$5K), Windbridge $25,000 lifetime fertility benefit cap, monthly IVF HYSA contribution $2,000. Target IVF HYSA balance $25,000 by November 2026.

name: Boston IVF Intake Summary - Personal Copy.md
description: Personal copy of Boston IVF intake summary. Feb 2026 consult timeline (baseline Oct 20 SUPERSEDED). Insurance coverage, protocol, medication list, nurse coordinator contact.

name: Boston IVF Consent Forms Bundle (signed 2026-02-20).pdf
description: Signed consent forms for standard antagonist protocol IVF cycle with Dr. James Cooper. Cryopreservation consent. Embryo disposition election.

name: Stim Cycle Medication Schedule Draft v2.md
description: Draft stim cycle medication schedule. Gonal-F 225 IU + Menopur 75 IU daily. Ganirelix acetate 250 mcg starting day 6. Lupron trigger. Prometrium suppositories post-transfer. Schedule anchored to reconciled baseline date.

name: Windbridge Insurance Coverage Notes - Fertility Benefit.md
description: Windbridge Partners fertility benefit $25,000 lifetime cap. Diagnostics and monitoring covered against cap. Sarah's ACA marketplace plan covers nothing fertility-related.

name: Weekly Nurse Coordinator Q&A Log.md
description: Running log of Brian's questions for the Friday weekly nurse coordinator calls with Jenna Martinez RN.

name: Household Budget 2026Q3 - Pre-Rebuild.csv
description: Monthly budget snapshot. Contains Sarah freelance monthly assumption line at $7,083.33 (based on $85K annual straight-line divided by 12). SUPERSEDED; the reconciled projected read is derived from the QuickBooks trailing-four-month actuals, not from this straight-line assumption.

name: Current Lease 2025-11-01 to 2026-10-31 Unit 3.pdf
description: Current 12-month lease from Mike Callahan for 224 Massachusetts Ave Unit 3, Cambridge. Monthly rent $3,200. Expires 2026-10-31; renewal via DocuSign envelope in progress.

name: Lease Renewal 2026-11-01 - DocuSign Receipt.md
description: Personal copy of the DocuSign envelope receipt from landlord Mike Callahan. Authoritative monthly rent for 2026-11-01 through 2027-10-31 is $3,400.00. Signature pending Brian + Sarah decision.

name: IVF Binder Index.csv
description: Table of contents pointing into every file in the IVF binder. Baseline Monitoring Timeline Printout v1 marked SUPERSEDED.

name: NEJM Manuscript v2 Personal Copy - Adaptive Enrichment mRNA-4157.docx
description: Personal copy of the v2 revision of the NEJM methods paper with Dr. Rebecca Foster. Adaptive enrichment designs in individualized cancer vaccine Phase 2 trials. Submission deadline 2026-12-16.

name: Sarah Freelance Blackout Draft Q4 2026.md
description: Sarah's client commitments Q4 2026 (Herald Post, Coastal Wellness, Bright Path, Cambridge Symphony) and intended 10-14 day light-load window during IVF stim block. Blackout window depends on the reconciled baseline date - do not lock until reconciled.

name: Migraine Diary Export - 30 days ending 2026-10-21.csv
description: Local CSV export of the Airtable migraine diary rolling window ending 2026-10-21 (day before Dr. Liu neurology visit). 9 episode-present days; trigger tags include weather_pressure_drop, poor_sleep, skipped_meals, fluorescent_light_office.

name: README - Deliverable Destinations.md
description: Deliverables land in this folder: Convergence Brief, Reconciliation Doc, Held-Actions Queue, and the two clinician draft notes (held at draft, never routed).
